name: Yang2020.com
subject: Just $27.93
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Make a contribution of this week’s average donation of $27.93

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4993%2E377263%2E-yl1YR) Yang Gang --

**With only 10 days left until the last and most important FEC fundraising deadline of the year, we need to show everyone this team is willing to fight for the future of our country.

[So chip in right now, Yang Gang, and we can propel our way through Super Tuesday. We’ve never needed you more than we do right now. Our average donation this week is $27.93.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20198?t=5&akid=4993%2E377263%2E-yl1YR)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20198?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4993%2E377263%2E-yl1YR)
---
| | [$27.93 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20198?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=27.93&akid=4993%2E377263%2E-yl1YR)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20198?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4993%2E377263%2E-yl1YR)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20198?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4993%2E377263%2E-yl1YR)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20198?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4993%2E377263%2E-yl1YR)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20198?t=11&amount=25&akid=4993%2E377263%2E-yl1YR)
---
We know December is a difficult month for most folks to donate. You’re traveling across the country to see friends and family, and you’ve spent your hard earned money on gifts.

But if you’re able, we need you to step up for the folks who can’t.

**[Make a contribution of this week’s average donation of $27.93 or whatever you can now to supercharge our end-of-year fundraising numbers.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20198?t=12&akid=4993%2E377263%2E-yl1YR)**

Let’s forge a new way forward,

Yang2020
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20198?t=13&akid=4993%2E377263%2E-yl1YR)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4993%2E377263%2E-yl1YR) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4993%2E377263%2E-yl1YR) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

subject: as of 4:30 PM
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |

| Team, there's some good news and some bad news:

The Good News: This morning we announced that we raised our first $100,000 toward our $700,000 fundraising goal!

The Bad News: Our campaign hinges on what we do at this moment, and as of 4:30PM we're falling short of our daily goal.

If we don't hit our fundraising goal, we won't be able to stay on track and launch our New Hampshire Investment Strategy paid media and organizing program!

We can't afford to let momentum slow before voters start making up their minds, friends.

[It's crucial that we keep our campaign growing as we move to persuade undecided voters in crucial early states.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8fb/134673f2/953093e/69979b89/1530212435/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_122119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[We wouldn't ask if it wasn't urgent, team. Over the past year, we've built an incredible movement in all 50 states and Puerto Rico organizing for big, structural change.

But if we're going to pull off a win in 2020 and send Elizabeth to the White House, it's absolutely crucial that every single person who's a part of this movement does their part in the final weeks before the caucuses and primaries.

Thank you so much for fighting by Elizabeth's side over the past year. We couldn't be more thankful -- **now, will you take the next step today and chip in for the first time to our campaign?**

[**Chip in today to continue the fight and win in 2020. Any amount, whether it's $1, $2, or $3 will have a powerful impact -- and we'll send you a free sticker as a thank you!**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bc74/45c30650/11676761a/66fa1c85/2112402996/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnItc3RpY2tlciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1NOTNGX0VHUl9TVEtfUV8yMDE5MTIyMV9WMVMyX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr-sticker?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM93F_EGR_STK_Q_20191221_V1S2_P")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team_Juli=C3=A1n?=
subject: behind our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | **We've set an ambitious goal for the end of the year, and right now we 're behind where we need to be to hit it. ** Our goal is based on a calculation of which programs we need to succeed early next year. We need to:
* **Fund our grassroots field efforts.** This includes offices, water, and field staff who recruit volunteers and talk to voters.
* Fund our [brand new ad (which you can watch here)](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc953/3eb3e2fc/69efdb54/744ec7e2/1542581154/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-castro-2020-primary?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+brand+new+ad+which+you+can+watch+here&utm_campaign=20191221_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191221_em_fr_b2_castro_all") to help spread our message.
* **Collect signatures and pay filing fees** to get on ballots across the country.

[We know how much it will cost to fully achieve these goals, and we're racing to keep up with self-funding billionaires. | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc953/3eb3e2fc/69efdb54/744ec7d7/1542581154/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191221_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191221_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc953/3eb3e2fc/69efdb54/744ec7d6/1542581154/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191221_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191221_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc953/3eb3e2fc/69efdb54/744ec7d5/1542581154/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191221_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191221_em_fr_b2_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Booker HQ
subject: Get your name on our brand new HQ donor wall!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| You'll want to get in on this >> Hey team, Catherine here again! As I'm writing to you, Cory is riding around Iowa in a brand new bus featuring the names of donors from across the country. And let me tell you, it looks _incredible!_ But the thing is, the bus can only fit so many names! We quickly ran out of room, so we decided to expand onto a big, blank wall we have here at Booker HQ. [**Want us to add your name? Donate now to get your name on our HQ donor wall.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191221_BHQ_20191221-fr-BHQ-EM3-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") You're a critical member of Team Cory, and we're super excited to make it official on the walls of HQ. And don't worry, I'll be sure to send over some photos once it's done! [**Be sure to chip in before it 's too late -- you won't want to miss this.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191221_BHQ_20191221-fr-BHQ-EM3-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Hope to see your name up there,
Catherine Catherine Gabel
Online Fundraising Director
Cory 2020 P.S. Check out our team putting all our donors' names on the bus! [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191221_BHQ_20191221-fr-BHQ-EM3-actives_actives_i1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cc8/5fca0d19/7bb12272/291ce469/3303840770/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cc8/5fca0d19/7bb12272/291ce468/3303840770/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cc8/5fca0d19/7bb12272/291ce477/3303840770/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cc8/5fca0d19/7bb12272/291ce476/3303840770/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cc8/5fca0d19/7bb12272/291ce475/3303840770/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0cc8/5fca0d19/7bb12272/291ce469/3303840770/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: 🎄 (It's a Christmas Tree)
body:
No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-ngkyit-ahkdjtlkr-o/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ngkyit-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,It's hard to believe we're even having this argument.Because it's **a Christmas Tree**.But somehow, not to Tony Evers! Gov. Evers decided to give a "holiday" present to his **radical Madison base,** when he officially re-named the **Christmas Tree** in the Wisconsin Capitol a "Holiday Tree," with an official theme of _" Celebrate Science."_I fought back against this **PC garbage** in Madison, and I can't wait to fight against it in Congress. [It's a Christmas Tree. Join Fitz.](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ngkyit-ahkdjtlkr-y/) Here's the best part: At the official tree-lighting ceremony, a high-school choir was invited to sing a few songs.Their first two? "**O Christmas Tree " **and "**O Come All Ye Faithful. "**_**You just can't make this kind of thing up.**_ And out in Washington, **Nancy Pelosi had a "Holiday" gift for President Trump too: impeachment.**I'm running for Congress to **fight** this kind of PC garbage, distraction, and wrong priorities. Merry Christmas,Scott FitzgeraldP.S., Your support will help us get off to a running start in 2020 - I hope you'll join my campaign with a generous gift of [$10, $25, 50, or even $100](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ngkyit-ahkdjtlkr-j/)! Thanks - Fitz
## **Join The Fight**
• Receive Campaign Updates
• Volunteer
• Invite Your Friends
## **Support President Trump**
• Scott Fitzgerald was one of the earliest and most loyal Trump supporters in Wisconsin.
• President Trump needs allies like Scott Fitzgerald in Washington.
## **Forward and Share**

Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
PO Box 102
Juneau, WI 53039

name: Jordan Overstreet
subject: "the admiral"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
For Nate's first time emailing you all, he certainly hit the nail on the head. This race is critically important, not just to restore real leadership to Washington, but to help flip the Senate.
|
---

| | Hi team: For Nate's first time emailing you all, he certainly hit the nail on the head. This race is critically important, not just to restore real leadership to Washington, but to help flip the Senate. **[I hope you can heed his call, and chip in to Mike's campaign. ](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243b/33365068/4a61753d/3f8b973f/4222603945/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191222_em_fr_all_natekick_L1&amount=15")** Thank you, Jordan PS: "Admiral Franken" did say to call him "Mike," but I guess those three stars can be a bit intimidating -- I'm sure Nate will get the hang of it soon, though. \--------Forwarded message--------
From: Nate Clem
Subject: an introduction
Date: Thrusday, December 19, 2019 Hello Team Franken, I'm Nate, Admiral Franken's new Finance Director, and I wanted to take a moment to say "Hi." Joining this campaign is a privilege for me, since I get to dedicate my time to electing a true leader for Iowa. The admiral is ready to go to Washington and fight for our farmers, our economy, and to take on the climate crisis. **But he can 't do it without your help.** **[Can you chip in $5, $10, or $15 today?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243b/33365068/4a61753d/3f8b9738/4222603945/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191222_em_fr_all_natekick_L2&amount=15")** | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243b/33365068/4a61753d/3f8b9739/4222603945/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191222_em_fr_all_natekick_btn1&amount=15")
---
This election is a crucial tossup, and we have a chance to flip this seat from red to blue -- making a Democratic majority more likely.
And that majority means we'll have the ability to lower the cost of health care, improve the quality of jobs in Iowa, **and hold our elected leaders accountable** \-- _a failure of Joni Ernst and the current Senate._
Look, I just drove to Iowa a couple of weeks ago, but I have to hit the ground running, because one of the most important deadlines are coming up quickly: our end-of-year fundraising goal.
[**Can you help us with a quick donation? Any amount helps.**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243b/33365068/4a61753d/3f8b973a/4222603945/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191222_em_fr_all_natekick_L3&amount=15")
_If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
[**$10**](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243b/33365068/4a61753d/3f8b973b/4222603945/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191222_em_fr_all_natekick_abx1&amount=10&express_lane=true") | **[$25](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243b/33365068/4a61753d/3f8b9734/4222603945/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191222_em_fr_all_natekick_abx2&amount=25&express_lane=true")** | **[$50](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243b/33365068/4a61753d/3f8b9735/4222603945/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191222_em_fr_all_natekick_abx3&amount=50&express_lane=true")**
---|---|---
**[$100](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243b/33365068/4a61753d/3f8b9736/4222603945/VEsO/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191222_em_fr_all_natekick_abx4&amount=100&express_lane=true")** | **[$250](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243b/33365068/4a61753d/3f8b9737/4222603945/VEsP/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191222_em_fr_all_natekick_abx5&amount=250&express_lane=true")** | **[Other](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243b/33365068/4a61753d/3f8b9730/4222603945/VEsHBQ/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191222_em_fr_all_natekick_abx6&amount=15")**
Thank you,
Nate Clem
Finance Director
Franken for Iowa

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f243b/33365068/4a61753d/3f8b9731/4222603945/VEsHBA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191222_em_fr_all_natekick_ftr&amount=15")

| Friend,

[New Mexico deserves better than Nancy Pelosi's out of touch Socialist, California values.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001l_7GyHCtW12-m8PpOV3QvIkdfa-DSnNLGgSkthjNIMEtnbuZr2Tx7uKYLzMob9k7b-r2-N2KpXH_pegxQLE8nyKmwyatk03sltaJiq7BOVlul6eYmsPPRZp-4MjKNOaq8jhpm49EmyM8djwSqS-QRhZUaoMjAzlbgqU6vXmLN18i51J5Z0pP25tj8SS2VaUO&c=PupKEQ4Ys0gvGe9JCfhRMKqlr48xddfwqT2G-IPVM7WLb_xnQ7Mibg==&ch=B_xyA9ILJbh7kx9LJTFIsbddqvefW1lWd4sIuRSQa4LMu1t7FKETvg==)

name: Mark Warner
subject: Not all surprises are good.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
As we head into the holidays, I want to talk to you about an issue that no family should have to deal with: surprise medical billing.
|
---
| | Derek,

As we head into the holidays, I want to talk to you about an issue that no family should have to deal with: surprise medical billing. **Every year far too many Americans are hit with outrageous medical bills because they were treated by an out-of-network provider or some other circumstances beyond their control.**

As someone whose family has been hit with these outrageous surprise bills before, I share the frustration of so many Americans who agree that this is just not fair. In the Senate, I'm fighting to pass legislation that would finally crack down on surprise medical billing. Unfortunately, special interests who profit off this practice have already spent $30 million in dark money attack ads against lawmakers, including me, trying to stop Congress doing something about it.

I want to be clear with you. **I am not going to back down on this issue or bow to the pressure.** I expect surprise medical billing to be a top healthcare issue in 2020, and I want to get your thoughts and stories about this issue to help me keep up the fight in the Senate to end surprise medical billing.

So, Derek, I'm asking you to take my survey on this issue, and if your family has experienced this before, to share your story using this form. | **[TAKE MY SURVEY](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d70f/53d9897e/5382e2db/1c89c20e/4225316259/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-medbills")**
---
Your feedback and your stories are incredibly valuable to me because it gives me first-hand accounts of just what's at stake with this issue. As we head into the holidays this week, it's my hope that this will be the last holiday season when Americans have to deal with these unfair surprise medical bills. Thanks so much for feedback and your continued support.

Happy holidays,
Mark Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d70f/53d9897e/5382e2db/1c89c20d/4225316259/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQwMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20191222_s_1_fl__403__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d70f/53d9897e/5382e2db/1c89c20c/4225316259/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Team Betsy
subject: Do you care?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wfaV1t2MwCMLXx79tGabUVvSYdIFVCz8GyoR06UqbzE=/9r5AbobGlTj1fvY7nbvne3j85mBPog58HhdBIijgDuE=?refcode=issues1)
---
What matters most to you? The environment? The cost of health care? Good-paying jobs? Great public education and affordable college? _**Are you concerned that Ohio is nationally renowned for**_ _**abortion bans, voter suppression, and pro-gun legislation?**_ _**Then you should care about what happens in our state legislature.**_ It's here at the state level that we can address what matters most. For far too long, many Democrats have focused their attention only at the national level, letting Republicans take over our state legislatures and gerrymander us nearly out of existence. 2020 is the year we absolutely have to flip seats in the state legislature, move this state forward, and get ready to re-draw the congressional districts that will determine our representation for the next ten years. **And Betsy is running for an open seat that we can win!** **That 's why the Republicans will pour money into this race.** **Please donate NOW to make your voice heard on the issues that matter most. ** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/wfaV1t2MwCMLXx79tGabUVvSYdIFVCz8GyoR06UqbzE=/9r5AbobGlTj1fvY7nbvne3j85mBPog58HhdBIijgDuE=?refcode=issues1)

name: Team Stephanie
subject: 39 reasons why Chris Smith has to go in 2020
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
We've made a list, we've checked it twice. Chris Smith is definitely naughty, not nice.
|
---

| | As the year (and the decade) come to a close, we're reflecting on this race, our path ahead, and what it will take to flip this seat. **And like any good end of year reflection, we 've made a list of all the reasons -- all 39 of them -- why Rep. Chris Smith has to go. (But if you already know why he has to go, [click here to chip in to Stephanie's campaign](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff099/522d4087/7afc2030/4f3415ca/150346980/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191222_em_fr_39reasons_l1").)**
## _39 Reasons Why We Must Defeat Chris Smith in 2020_
1. He switched parties -- from Democrat to Republican -- in 1978.
2. He did so to run for this seat.
3. He was first elected in 1980.
4. He was just 28 at the time.
5. Since 1981, he's "represented" this district.
6. But he hasn't had a town hall in over 26 years.
7. He spends significantly more time at his home in Herndon, Virginia than in our District.
8. __Taxpayers have paid him $5,300,000 in salary!!!__
9. His salary has tripled -- from $69,000 in 1981 to $174,000 today.
10. While voters have evolved on issues like women's rights and LGBTQ+ rights, his views have not.
11. He is a champion of the global gag rule.
12. The global gag rule endangers women and girls across the world.
13. It blocks U.S. funding for international non-governmental organizations that provide reproductive health care services.
14. He hasn't stopped there -- if it were up to him, all abortions would be banned.
15. Period.
16. No exceptions.
17. He voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act over 50 times.
18. He voted against the Lower Drug Costs Now Act.
19. He voted against the Violence Against Women Act.
20. He voted against the Equality Act.
21. He will likely vote against the Reproductive Rights Are Human Rights Act.
22. (Stephanie wrote that bill!)
23. He is the co-chairman of the Congressional Pro-Life Caucus.
24. He co-chairs Trump's Pro-Life Coalition.
25. Today, he's 66 years old.
26. He's spent nearly 39 years in Congress.
27. That's _87% of his adult life_.
28. He's won 19 elections to represent this district.
29. But in 2018, he had his tightest election to date.
30. The Democratic candidate cut Smith's average margin of victory in half.
31. 2018's election proved that residents of NJ-04 want someone in Washington who's fighting for us...
32. ... For the more than 700,000 constituents in this district.
33. ... For the 303,900 people (including Stephanie) in this district with pre-existing conditions.
34. In the last quarter, Stephanie nearly outraised Smith (after being in the race for just under a month).
35. In 2020, we can give him the fight of his career.
36. Stephanie Schmid can win.
37. She will fight for us in Washington.
38. Stephanie will bring new leadership to this district.
39. **_We 'll say it again: Stephanie can win on November 3, 2020._**

[**So, if you can, chip in $39 right now to flip this seat and send Chris Smith packing.**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff099/522d4087/7afc2030/4f3415c9/150346980/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191222_em_fr_39reasons_l2") [**Together, we can send Stephanie Schmid to Congress ... and we can make sure this list doesn't get any longer.**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff099/522d4087/7afc2030/4f3415c8/150346980/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191222_em_fr_39reasons_l3") | **[CONTRIBUTE $39 NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff099/522d4087/7afc2030/4f3415c7/150346980/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191222_em_fr_39reasons_btn&amount=39")**
---

|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to[unsubscribe](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff099/522d4087/7afc2030/4f3415c6/150346980/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.bsd.net/unsubscribe") at any time._

name: TX Election Alert
subject: Great news and less great news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We have just over eight weeks until early voting begins in the primary. That's NOT a lot of time.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069e/7f51f7bc/4a1c9f45/4ef0c79c/3496048979/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Great news, Peter: We hit our goal of 25,000 donors! **THANK YOU.**

Less great news: We have just over eight weeks until early voting begins in the primary. That's NOT a lot of time.

**_So to help us turbo-charge our preparations, we 're announcing a One-Day Primary Fund Goal of $20,000!_** Your donation will help us reach more voters, hire more staff, and build up the support we need to defeat Senator Cornyn and bring change to the Senate. **[Pitch in now>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069e/7f51f7bc/4a1c9f45/4ef0c793/3496048979/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?refcode=email_20191222.1nd__665__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069e/7f51f7bc/4a1c9f45/4ef0c793/3496048979/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?refcode=email_20191222.1nd__665__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
It may not seem like it, but February 18 (when early voting begins in the Texas primary) is right around the corner. We know MJ is the best candidate to take on McConnell's henchman Senator John Cornyn -- KXAN reported that she "leads the U.S. Senate race in more ways than one" \-- but now we have to prove it to Texas voters.

**As the end of the year approaches, we 've never needed you more. Will you chip in NOW to our One-Day Primary Fund Goal and help us raise $20,000 to go into the primary STRONG?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069e/7f51f7bc/4a1c9f45/4ef0c792/3496048979/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191222.1nd__665__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069e/7f51f7bc/4a1c9f45/4ef0c791/3496048979/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191222.1nd__665__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069e/7f51f7bc/4a1c9f45/4ef0c790/3496048979/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191222.1nd__665__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069e/7f51f7bc/4a1c9f45/4ef0c797/3496048979/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191222.1nd__665__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069e/7f51f7bc/4a1c9f45/4ef0c796/3496048979/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?refcode=email_20191222.1nd__665__")**
Thanks,
Team MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069e/7f51f7bc/4a1c9f45/4ef0c793/3496048979/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?refcode=email_20191222.1nd__665__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Sara 2020
subject: Who is behind the mystery super PAC that's running ads to support Susan Collins' reelection campaign?
body:
We have no idea where the money is coming from.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ffa/4bef7a87/6a21d318/287fe931/522444921/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friend --
A mystery super PAC posing as a Maine group has been dropping huge sums of money on ads supporting Susan Collins.
But new reporting revealed the mystery super PAC is tied to a D.C. group spending millions to back big business interests.
This is exactly what we've come to expect from Senator Collins. She teams up with shady, big money donors and then votes to protect their interests instead of doing what's best for Maine families.
Well, we've had enough:
**[Chip in $3 right away to help our grassroots campaign keep up with Susan Collins and her secret rich backers.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ffa/4bef7a87/6a21d318/287fe930/522444921/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjItMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191222-1-full")**
When Sara Gideon wins this election next year, it won't be because of super PACs backed by D.C. special interest groups and big business. **It will be because hundreds and thousands of our supporters stepped up and chipped in whatever they could afford.**
So thank you for all you do for our grassroots movement. We can't do this without you.
All our best,
Team Sara

clean_body: We have no idea where the money is coming from. "" Friend -- A mystery super PAC posing as a Maine group has been dropping huge sums of money on ads supporting Susan Collins. But new reporting revealed the mystery super PAC is tied to a D.C. group spending millions to back big business interests. This is exactly what we've come to expect from Senator Collins. She teams up with shady, big money donors and then votes to protect their interests instead of doing what's best for Maine families. Well, we've had enough: "" When Sara Gideon wins this election next year, it won't be because of super PACs backed by D.C. special interest groups and big business. It will be because hundreds and thousands of our supporters stepped up and chipped in whatever they could afford. So thank you for all you do for our grassroots movement. We can't do this without you. All our best, Team Sara **** ""** Sara Gideon for Maine PO Box 812 South Freeport, ME 04078

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Dear Madam Speaker (Love, Donald Trump)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Dear Madam Speaker: I write to express my strongest and most powerful protest against the partisan impeachment crusade being pursued by the Democrats in the House of Representatives. This impeachment represents an unprecedented and unconstitutional abuse of power by Democrat Lawmakers, unequaled in nearly two and a half centuries of American legislative history. ...Your first claim, "Abuse of Power," is a completely disingenuous, meritless, and baseless invention of your imagination. You know that I had a totally innocent conversation with the President of Ukraine. I then had a second conversation that has been misquoted, mischaracterized, and fraudulently misrepresented. Fortunately, there was a transcript of the conversation taken, and you know from the transcript (which was immediately made available) that the paragraph in question was perfect. ....The second claim, so-called "Obstruction of Congress," is preposterous and dangerous. House Democrats are trying to impeach the duly elected President of the United States for asserting Constitutionally based privileges that have been asserted on a bipartisan basis by administrations of both political parties throughout our Nation's history. Under that standard, every American president would have been impeached many times over. ...Congressman Adam Schiff cheated and lied all the way up to the present day, even going so far as to fraudulently make up, out of thin air, my conversation with President Zelensky of Ukraine and read this fantasy language to Congress as though it were said by me. His shameless lies and deceptions, dating all the way back to the Russia Hoax, is one of the main reasons we are here today. ...You are the ones interfering in America's elections. You are the ones subverting America's Democracy. You are the ones Obstructing Justice. You are the ones bringing pain and suffering to our Republic for your own selfish personal, political, and partisan gain. ...More due process was afforded to those accused in the Salem Witch Trials. ...I have no doubt the American people will hold you and the Democrats fully responsible in the upcoming 2020 election. They will not soon forgive your perversion of justice and abuse of power. ...There is far too much that needs to be done to improve the lives of our citizens. It is time for you and the highly partisan Democrats in Congress to immediately cease this impeachment fantasy and get back to work for the American People. While I have no expectation that you will do so, I write this letter to you for the purpose of history and to put my thoughts on a permanent and indelible record. ...This is nothing more than an illegal, partisan attempted coup that will, based on recent sentiment, badly fail at the voting booth. You are not just after me, as President, you are after the entire Republican Party. But because of this colossal injustice, our party is more united than it has ever been before. History will judge you harshly as you proceed with this impeachment Charade. Your legacy will be that of turning the House of Representatives from a revered legislative body into a Star Chamber of partisan persecution. One hundred years from now, when people look back at this affair, I want them to understand it, and learn from it, so that it can never happen to another President again. Donald J. Trump **Should Trump resign from office immediately?** [**YES**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf66/6e9863e8/17462813/1db04a07/3078144649/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/JV8YSsZs") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf66/6e9863e8/17462813/1db04a07/3078144649/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/JV8YSsZs") Thank you, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf66/6e9863e8/17462813/1db04a0b/3078144649/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191222a.ND&refcode2=iU5eD3so5U164mFITSI0")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

PO Box 15320
Washington, DC 20003

[Unsubscribe](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf66/6e9863e8/17462813/1db04a09/3078144649/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/unsubscribe")

Still, not convinced to give $22 today? Okay! Here are a few great reasons why you should:
* _With the Iowa caucuses**only 43 days away**_ , we're coming down to the wire to make sure our Hawkeye State team has all the resources they need to win big.
* Running TV ads gets to be expensive. Your donation could be used to spread Cory's message of unity and love across cable media markets everywhere and help us qualify for the January debate.
* We've crunched the numbers here at Booker HQ, and we're on track to have our best fundraising quarter EVER.
* And lastly (and easiest of them all): **Cory Booker would make a fantastic president.**

[**So I 'm hoping I (and Cory!) can count on you to donate $22 before the end of the day >>**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191222_BHQ_20191222-fr-BHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Catherine

Peter,
Over the past few days, Dan Crenshaw has been attending Turning Point USA’s Student Action Summit in Palm Beach, Florida.
**Other notable guests?** Donald Trump Jr., Ben Shapiro, Rudy Giuliani, Dinesh D’Souza, Laura Ingraham, Glenn Beck... the list goes on. [**If you think your representative should be prioritizing the people and not their extremist buddies, chip in $15 right now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13138331/136014272/1785235803?refcode=1222_eoq2&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTljZWE2ZC1mZjI0LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YzBR_U3qENj7QfJMZg5B60qpzw7bQtCUgrbQQSJKjWA=)
**What is Turning Point USA best known for?**
→ A text message from the group’s second highest ranking official to another employee saying, **“I HATE BLACK PEOPLE... I hate blacks. End of story.”**
→ Tweets from a member of the field team involving derogatory language directed towards black people, gay people, and the cherry on top, “I am always making racist comments lol” followed by **“if you’re a race other than white I promise to make racist jokes towards you.”**
→ Multiple allegations of violating campaign finance laws.
These are just a few examples of the horrific things that come out of Turning Point USA. **Apparently Dan Crenshaw thinks that this is an organization that young people should be learning from.**
**[Think it’s time for a change? Invest in a campaign that is going to send Crenshaw and his racist buddies packing >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13138332/136014273/1785235803?refcode=1222_eoq2&amount=15&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTljZWE2ZC1mZjI0LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YzBR_U3qENj7QfJMZg5B60qpzw7bQtCUgrbQQSJKjWA=)**
Dan Crenshaw is setting an example for our children that hateful language, racism, and extremism are important to being an elected official. I think Texans would rather their Representative focus on issues like healthcare and public schools, don’t you?

clean_body: = Peter, Over the past few days, Dan Crenshaw has been attending Turning Point USA’s Student Action Summit in Palm Beach, Florida. Other notable guests? Donald Trump Jr., Ben Shapiro, Rudy Giuliani, Dinesh D’Souza, Laura Ingraham, Glenn Beck... the list goes on. = What is Turning Point USA best known for? → A text message from the group’s second highest ranking official to another employee saying, “I HATE BLACK PEOPLE... I hate blacks. End of story.” → Tweets from a member of the field team involving derogatory language directed towards black people, gay people, and the cherry on top, “I am always making racist comments lol” followed by “if you’re a race other than white I promise to make racist jokes towards you.” → Multiple allegations of violating campaign finance laws. These are just a few examples of the horrific things that come out of Turning Point USA. Apparently Dan Crenshaw thinks that this is an organization that young people should be learning from. = Dan Crenshaw is setting an example for our children that hateful language, racism, and extremism are important to being an elected official. I think Texans would rather their Representative focus on issues like healthcare and public schools, don’t you? = | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** Thanks for being a part of this team, Elisa Cardnell Do you follow us on and ? Join us there to see more campaign updates! = Days until the Texas Primary Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress Elisa Cardnell for Congress PO Box 667253 Houston, TX 77266 United States

body:
Will you take my final Democratic Survey of the year before midnight tomorrow? I need input from 10,000 Democrats to ensure 2020 is Mitch McConnell's LAST year in power. >>
---
| | [Will you take my final Democratic Survey of the year before midnight tomorrow? I need input from 10,000 Democrats to ensure 2020 is Mitch McConnell's LAST year in power. >> ](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b779/18e32a7f/50827725/7b228dc0/1002093335/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191222_em_pet_b1_lujan_all") | I just launched my final Democratic Survey of the entire year.

We're days from the most consequential election year in our country's history -- **I 'm going to make sure it's Mitch McConnell's final year in power.**

_[**10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: It would mean so much if you 'd take 30 seconds to share your feedback with me. I'm relying on your input more than you know to WIN this critical Senate race and FLIP McConnell's Senate >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b779/18e32a7f/50827725/7b228dc0/1002093335/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191222_em_pet_b1_lujan_all")_
** ** ****NAME** : **dpwillis67@gmail.com**** ** ** | **[TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b779/18e32a7f/50827725/7b228dc0/1002093335/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191222_em_pet_b1_lujan_all")**
---

I don't say this lightly:

We're days from the biggest election year in our country's history.

**And I 'm going to make sure it's Mitch McConnell's LAST year in power. **

[_**I just launched my final and most important Democratic Survey of the year. I need 10,000 responses to start the year off with an unbeatable strategy to WIN my Senate race and DEFEAT McConnell 's Senate. Can I count on your input? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b779/18e32a7f/50827725/7b228dc0/1002093335/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191222_em_pet_b1_lujan_all")

I watched in disgust as McConnell covered up President Trump's ties to Russia...

As he threatened our Medicare and Social Security...

As he sabotaged Democrats' critical legislation to prevent gun violence...

**I will NOT watch him win another term in power. **

[_**You helped me make history and take back the House for Democrats last year. Now, I 'm asking you to help me take back the Senate. It's going to take every single Democrat coming to the table to shape our winning strategy. Can I count on your critical input? >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b779/18e32a7f/50827725/7b228dc0/1002093335/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/democratic-leadership-survey?source=20191222_em_pet_b1_lujan_all")

I'm so grateful to have you on this team,

Ben Ray Lujan

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b779/18e32a7f/50827725/7b228dc1/1002093335/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b779/18e32a7f/50827725/7b228dc6/1002093335/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b779/18e32a7f/50827725/7b228dc7/1002093335/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b779/18e32a7f/50827725/7b228dc4/1002093335/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b779/18e32a7f/50827725/7b228dc5/1002093335/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b779/18e32a7f/50827725/7b228dfa/1002093335/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

| | | | | |

| Peter,
It might sound strange to hear, but these Democratic debates are truly the gift that keeps on giving.
This week's debate just might have been the most entertaining yet. If you enjoy awkward moments, head scratchers, and just plain absurdity, then check out our video below of the top 12 "highlights" from the December debate.

body:
Yesterday, we launched our Big Structural Change Fund with a goal of 30,000 donations in three days to help power our movement in the final weeks before the primaries and caucuses, and we wanted to... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bdb9/45c30650/11635b2e4/66fa3677/1043814090/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Yesterday, we launched our Big, Structural Change Fund with a goal of 30,000 donations in three days to help power our movement in the final weeks before the primaries and caucuses, and we wanted to give you a quick update on our progress so far:

**On the first day, we wanted to get 10,000 donations, but we didn't hit that mark.** That means we need more than 10,000 donations today to get back on track toward hitting our three day goal.

If everyone who reads this email chips in even just a dollar, we'll reach our goal in no time. But not everyone does that. That's why we need you. clean_body: Yesterday, we launched our Big Structural Change Fund with a goal of 30,000 donations in three days to help power our movement in the final weeks before the primaries and caucuses, and we wanted to... | | | "" Yesterday, we launched our Big, Structural Change Fund with a goal of 30,000 donations in three days to help power our movement in the final weeks before the primaries and caucuses, and we wanted to give you a quick update on our progress so far: On the first day, we wanted to get 10,000 donations, but we didn't hit that mark. That means we need more than 10,000 donations today to get back on track toward hitting our three day goal. If everyone who reads this email chips in even just a dollar, we'll reach our goal in no time. But not everyone does that. That's why we need you. If you've been waiting for a good time to make an impact, donating any amount -- whether it's $1, $2, or $5 -- will be crucial to our efforts in the next few weeks. name: John Hickenlooper 2020
subject: The bad news you need to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
I have good news to share, folks: Since John emailed you earlier this week about our year-end fundraising goal, we've seen an incredible surge of contributions from grassroots donors. **But here 's the bad news: We're still projecting to fall short of our $500,000 goal before the FEC deadline expires.** This race is going to begin for real in January. We know Mitch McConnell's billionaire network is going to do and spend whatever it takes to tear down our campaign in a desperate attempt to win this Senate race. With only a few weeks left until the most important FEC fundraising deadline we've ever faced, any donation you make will impact our ability to fight back and build a winning campaign in 2020. [**Our campaign is powered by grassroots donors, not corporate PACs or right-wing dark money groups. Can you contribute right now to help us get back on track before our year-end deadline?**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191220-eoy?refcode=em-191222-good-news-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191220-eoy?refcode=em-191222-good-news-full&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Thanks for everything you do. -- M.E. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc955/3eb3e2fc/69f4b813/744ec137/36935590/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191222_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191222_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc955/3eb3e2fc/69f4b813/744ec136/36935590/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191222_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191222_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc955/3eb3e2fc/69f4b813/744ec135/36935590/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191222_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191222_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Donald Trump wants to take SNAP benefits from millions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, The Trump administration announced rule changes to the SNAP program, formerly known as food stamps, that would tighten work requirements for receiving benefits \-- kicking almost 700,000 people off of much-needed benefits. This latest move, combined with two other proposed rule changes yet to be finalized, would force a total of 3.7 million Americans off of SNAP. If this doesn't show the inhumanity and heartlessness of the current government, we don't know what does. Telling families in need that they are on their own and that the government no longer supports them is cruel, demeaning, and harmful while saving the government only pennies. [**We need engaged Democrats to stand with us today in calling on the Trump administration to reverse its decision and keep American families on SNAP today. We need at least 5,000 signatures today to send a strong message that we do not approve of this inhumanity and cruelty.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf15/6e9863e8/174061fe/1db04a0f/2207687242/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/support-snap/?code=WDTO&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fs.surveyplanet.com%2Fw2MckZvD") Thank you for supporting working families today. The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf15/6e9863e8/174061fe/1db04a0f/2207687242/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/support-snap/?code=WDTO&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fs.surveyplanet.com%2Fw2MckZvD")
---

name: Jane Fonda
subject: I'm reaching out today to ask you to join me in supporting my friend and co-author of the Green New Deal, Senator Ed Markey.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
The truth is that we cannot make the change we need at the scale we need as lone individuals. We must work together. | |
---
| Friends -

I'm reaching out today to ask you to join me in supporting my friend and co-author of the Green New Deal, Senator Ed Markey.

As you may have heard, I've gotten into the habit of getting arrested in our nation's capital -- putting my body on the line with young people, making an intergenerational compact to demand a Green New Deal.

Earlier this year, Senator Ed Markey told me he needed us to help build an army of activists.

We need people in the streets demanding action on the climate crisis. The Green New Deal won't happen without it, but it also won't happen without powerful leaders like Senator Markey inside fighting with us.

That's why we need to make sure our army is behind him every step of the way as well.

Right now, that means he needs our support in his re-election campaign to the U.S Senate. He's facing the toughest race of his career in 2020.

**[Can you make a donation to Senator Ed Markey's campaign today ahead of the official FEC deadline? The future of our planet depends in many ways on having his powerful leadership in the Senate fighting for the Green New Deal.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfd3/693b8b0a/439a013c/72de7ed7/1934283764/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjItZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191222-full")**

Through our protests (and arrests) in Washington, I've gotten to know Ed quite well. He's led on this issue for decades.

He understands that urgent action is needed but it will be hard to accomplish. Because we need systemic change across every sector of our society and it must happen very quickly.

And the truth is that we cannot make the change we need at the scale we need as lone individuals. It will only be possible by combining our powers and lifting our voices together. There's strength in numbers. This is a collective, existential crisis that requires us to come together to fight.

The same is true for campaigns like Senator Markey's.

It is only with a movement of people behind him that he can win and continue to lead on this issue.

People in this country are really scared about the climate crisis and its threat to our planet and its people. They want to do something, but nobody has asked them.

So today, I'm asking you to do something:

**[Please make a donation to Senator Ed Markey today. There's an important FEC deadline coming up in a few days, and I want to make sure everyone knows that our army is behind him -- not just in the fight for the Green New Deal but also to support his re-election campaign.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfd3/693b8b0a/439a013c/72de7ed7/1934283764/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjItZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191222-full")**

These fights will not be easy, but Senator Markey and I are up for them. I hope you are too. Please join with us.

Thank you,

Jane Fonda **[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfd3/693b8b0a/439a013c/72de7ed7/1934283764/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjItZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191222-full")**

---

| | Paid for by The Markey Committee
---
Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.

[Click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfd3/693b8b0a/439a013c/72de7ed6/1934283764/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://action.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") to unsubscribe

[http://www.edmarkey.com](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfd3/693b8b0a/439a013c/72de7ed5/1934283764/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://www.edmarkey.com")
clean_body: The truth is that we cannot make the change we need at the scale we need as lone individuals. We must work together. | | | Friends - I'm reaching out today to ask you to join me in supporting my friend and co-author of the Green New Deal, Senator Ed Markey. As you may have heard, I've gotten into the habit of getting arrested in our nation's capital -- putting my body on the line with young people, making an intergenerational compact to demand a Green New Deal. Earlier this year, Senator Ed Markey told me he needed us to help build an army of activists. We need people in the streets demanding action on the climate crisis. The Green New Deal won't happen without it, but it also won't happen without powerful leaders like Senator Markey inside fighting with us. That's why we need to make sure our army is behind him every step of the way as well. Right now, that means he needs our support in his re-election campaign to the U.S Senate. He's facing the toughest race of his career in 2020. "" Through our protests (and arrests) in Washington, I've gotten to know Ed quite well. He's led on this issue for decades. He understands that urgent action is needed but it will be hard to accomplish. Because we need systemic change across every sector of our society and it must happen very quickly. And the truth is that we cannot make the change we need at the scale we need as lone individuals. It will only be possible by combining our powers and lifting our voices together. There's strength in numbers. This is a collective, existential crisis that requires us to come together to fight. The same is true for campaigns like Senator Markey's. It is only with a movement of people behind him that he can win and continue to lead on this issue. People in this country are really scared about the climate crisis and its threat to our planet and its people. They want to do something, but nobody has asked them. So today, I'm asking you to do something: "" These fights will not be easy, but Senator Markey and I are up for them. I hope you are too. Please join with us. Thank you, Jane Fonda "" | | Paid for by The Markey Committee Contributions or gifts to The Markey Committee are not tax deductible.

SEN. CORNYN**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890698/7f51f7bc/4a1100d8/4ef0c7f1/2843893537/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?refcode=email_20191222.2nd__663__&amount=10&recurring=true")

Beyond her ability to defeat Sen. Cornyn (she's a decorated combat veteran and tough-as-Texas Democrat), MJ's running on an inspiring platform that Texans need to hear. **[That's why we need your help to spread her message far and wide before early voting starts on February 18. Can you make a donation now?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890698/7f51f7bc/4a1100d8/4ef0c7f1/2843893537/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?refcode=email_20191222.2nd__663__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

MJ wants to clean up the system so politicians actually serve their constituents, not their corporate donors. And when elected leaders listen to the needs of the people rather than special interests, we can **take aggressive action on climate change, end the gun violence epidemic, protect and expand our health care** , and beyond.

As her campaign manager, you can trust me on this: **When MJ wants something done, she gets it done.** That's why we need her taking on Sen. Cornyn -- because MJ will put everything she has into completing her mission and winning this race.

**So Peter, can you pitch in now to help make sure MJ 's the nominee and send her into the general election with the resources to take on Sen. Cornyn?**

A woman's right to choose is in jeopardy, Team. Republicans across this country are fighting to strip away abortion access by overturning Roe v. Wade.
With multiple restrictive state abortion laws making their way to the Supreme Court, Republicans think this is their chance to overturn Roe v. Wade. With Donald Trump in the White House, Mitch McConnell in the Senate and Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court, **a woman 's right to choose has never been more at risk. **
Democrats are fighting back, but we need to hear from grassroots supporters like you. Tell us before midnight:

clean_body: | | | | Hi there: My name is Sophia, and I’m a graphic designer at Tom 2020. I support Tom because he uses his platform to help others and makes me feel valued, seen, and heard. Check out the updates from Tom 2020 this week: 🎙 Thursday was Tom’s third debate — I was there, and it was such an amazing experience to watch in person. Tom did a fantastic job — it made me so proud to be a part of this team. 🗽 Want to participate in our democracy in a unique, impactful way? Be a delegate for Tom at the Democratic convention in Milwaukee next July, where the Democratic nominee will be selected! Tom needs supporters like you to represent him — ⛄ ‘Tis the season to share warm wishes and holiday cheer. and share what you’re grateful for this year and what you’re looking forward to in 2020. 🎁 Give the gift of a shift! A Tom 2020 volunteer shift, that is. As we round out the year, we’re also getting ready to hit the ground running in 2020. We’ll be making calls, sending texts, and knocking on doors — many hands make light (and fun!) work, so we hope you’ll join us. 📸 Speaking of volunteering... Last weekend, our teams in Iowa, New Hampshire, and Nevada turned out big-time for a Weekend of Action, and the impact was remarkable. Here are some of our favorite photos from a few of the events: If you have any questions or comments, let us know at mailto:info@tomsteyer.commailto:info@tomsteyer.commailto:info@tomsteyer.com Happy holidays, Sophia Sophia Lu Designer Tom 2020 P.S. We knew that setting a $700,000 fundraising goal would be difficult.

We knew we couldn't do it without the support of our grassroots team.

[But we know that Michael is our best chance to beat Donald Trump and return decency to the White House, so we can't stop fighting for this campaign.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8f4/134673f2/96ae8a4/69979c51/355774175/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122219_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

body:
Clearly, Congressional Democrats are acting out due to their sheer hatred of President Trump. We can and must do better.They gave Congress the power to impeach to protect us from tyrants. President Trump is NOT a tyrant. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_s=b83dcff046e44b628c15c813508b7b97&_t=kZIGQAi5QRMgzH5zRPobEQRemLRd5yVXDO_uT3jA-7TeDdI-YC-liMNKcRrIX2HVNHEM7plojfEV33e3xwghaYOZTVF4L81GqEjhlYgSOeTjyjCiYJ2SIJQSTSQtA963E1wMZDq23ZQjzrjAff-31Fnzp_oQkRsiXnYIq0-9SQs%3D) | [](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=b83dcff046e44b628c15c813508b7b97&_e=VU_wQFo5SL7QzDTnreAnEHJ_X6WUPOU9s0c1mjgv5NXi8hf4w_wRa4sXP7Kq3KZyV_mAKnWBp5hJSmLJ2ysDyqc5nW5sFuQFtRothgHu2CGWJWIEhTO8pLPHMi7WMgvatxCvHOJSn-vPAUqLZ0erfYH80MjZP_3CdvfKfmZvM8oHQcm0UzTjAnGVgSL4yhvVefkmdMwchfI67abptTrxrPrsvqid12WnDe8dF26twdS4V397UWOpH0uNtKNSrmzzKz348HdJ-Z0PmGx8S1vr8dGJFekhv6Yc3LrGbVMIEhNn1fmUfSQPuQ2nsrRECvgr)

Friend,

They did it.

Democrats – led by Nancy Pelosi -- hedged their bets and impeached President Trump in the House, seeking to overturn **the decision 63 million Americans** collectively made on November 8th, 2016.

_It’s a shame._

_It’s a sham._

But do you know what I think the worst part about this spectacle has been? **The wasted opportunities that Pelosi, Hoyer, and the six standing committee chairmen decided weren’t worth their time addressing** ; think about all of the late nights their congressional aids spent crafting ways to implicate President Trump when they should have been finding ways to:
1. End illegal immigration
2. Secure our borders
3. Making the 2017 tax cuts PERMANENT
4. Protecting life

| [**Help Me Freshen Up Congress
Donate Today! **](http://links.action.supportlerahlee.com/u/click?_t=373d8efff4ea40c0bf9c4b3df62412f3&_m=b83dcff046e44b628c15c813508b7b97&_e=VU_wQFo5SL7QzDTnreAnEHJ_X6WUPOU9s0c1mjgv5NXi8hf4w_wRa4sXP7Kq3KZyV_mAKnWBp5hJSmLJ2ysDyqc5nW5sFuQFtRothgHu2CH29h-D9OVWu8hUY8cACI-ppLAsD4-tNiVi768V3Ac_vk5yvQ9Y6FRb-kFv2lGqhM6DvPsgK4lS5fp7b48jpUQ03YSJEo0q5DSmETZ1aYlXkTfnZBfy-by53mc1nQGlcrk0cM5-GWdy2Nn5ALcbGkmC1uhU3rJbyYJG8zISMtx9ih_iDRIbNLig5NPk2-2mmwg1lDKyPo1_Fxocq58oQOp9)

name: Wendy Davis
subject: They will never silence us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
This is personal for so many women. But we need you in on this fight.
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aa5/704929dc/1604f9ff/3993e481/2551420508/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2RmY19lbWFpbCMiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azM2LXN1LW5kLVYxIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk36-su-nd-V1&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361aa5/704929dc/1604f9ff/3993e480/2551420508/VEsE/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-reproductive_rights?firstName=&lastName=&email=productionqa@annelewisllc.com&zip=&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk36-su-nd-V1&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-reproductive_rights%3Fcode%3Djtk36-su-nd-V1")
Friend,
**[I need your name on my petition to protect women's reproductive rights.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-reproductive_rights?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk36-su-nd-V1&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-reproductive_rights%3Fcode%3Djtk36-su-nd-V1")** But I also hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this is so personal, and so important to me.
There isn't anything easy about filibustering a bill for nearly 13 hours. You can't sit down. You can't eat or drink. You can't even go to the bathroom. My back hurt so much from standing that a colleague helped me fasten a back brace so I could keep going.
But you know what the hardest part was? Reading the real-life stories of the women who could have been impacted by that anti-abortion law.
Stories like that of Carol from Austin who, like me, made the very difficult decision to end a much-wanted pregnancy after a fatal fetal abnormality was discovered. My beautiful, hoped-for girl, Tate, likely wouldn't have survived to term according to multiple doctors. If she did survive, we were told, she would have suffered tremendously. So with the loving support of my family, I, like Carol, made the decision to terminate my much-wanted pregnancy.
This was a personal, heart-wrenching decision, and I cannot imagine a lawmaker wanting to score political points by intruding on my freedom to make that choice for myself.
But across the country, laws written and passed mainly by white men are curbing women's reproductive freedoms - culminating in a challenge that will soon be heard by the Supreme Court. Even in the halls of Congress, men like my opponent still vow to "oppose abortion in any form."
**But they will never succeed in silencing us.**

**That 's why I've set a goal for 5,000 supporters to sign my petition to defend women's reproductive freedoms.** **[Can I count on you to fight for abortion rights and add your name to my petition before midnight?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-reproductive_rights?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk36-su-nd-V1&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-reproductive_rights%3Fcode%3Djtk36-su-nd-V1")**
[Sign the petition](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-reproductive_rights?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk36-su-nd-V1&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-reproductive_rights%3Fcode%3Djtk36-su-nd-V1")
As hard as it was, sharing women's stories during the filibuster was also the most rewarding part of those long 13 hours. We lifted up their voices and spoke these truths to the country: **Abortion care is health care. It 's personal. And it must be protected.**
The day of the filibuster transcended anything I could have expected. It was a true awakening - one that we must never turn our backs on, especially in the face of GOP attacks on reproductive health care. **[Join me in fighting back by adding your name to my petition. We're just 43% to our goal, so please sign before our midnight deadline.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-reproductive_rights?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk36-su-nd-V1&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-reproductive_rights%3Fcode%3Djtk36-su-nd-V1")**
[Sign the petition](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-reproductive_rights?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk36-su-nd-V1&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-reproductive_rights%3Fcode%3Djtk36-su-nd-V1")

clean_body: This is personal for so many women. But we need you in on this fight. "" "" Friend, "" But I also hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this is so personal, and so important to me. There isn't anything easy about filibustering a bill for nearly 13 hours. You can't sit down. You can't eat or drink. You can't even go to the bathroom. My back hurt so much from standing that a colleague helped me fasten a back brace so I could keep going. But you know what the hardest part was? Reading the real-life stories of the women who could have been impacted by that anti-abortion law. Stories like that of Carol from Austin who, like me, made the very difficult decision to end a much-wanted pregnancy after a fatal fetal abnormality was discovered. My beautiful, hoped-for girl, Tate, likely wouldn't have survived to term according to multiple doctors. If she did survive, we were told, she would have suffered tremendously. So with the loving support of my family, I, like Carol, made the decision to terminate my much-wanted pregnancy. This was a personal, heart-wrenching decision, and I cannot imagine a lawmaker wanting to score political points by intruding on my freedom to make that choice for myself. But across the country, laws written and passed mainly by white men are curbing women's reproductive freedoms - culminating in a challenge that will soon be heard by the Supreme Court. Even in the halls of Congress, men like my opponent still vow to "oppose abortion in any form." But they will never succeed in silencing us. That 's why I've set a goal for 5,000 supporters to sign my petition to defend women's reproductive freedoms. "" "" As hard as it was, sharing women's stories during the filibuster was also the most rewarding part of those long 13 hours. We lifted up their voices and spoke these truths to the country: Abortion care is health care. It 's personal. And it must be protected. The day of the filibuster transcended anything I could have expected. It was a true awakening - one that we must never turn our backs on, especially in the face of GOP attacks on reproductive health care. "" "" Thank you, Wendy If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can "".

http://richardsforcongress.com?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=ef912e69ad-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_17_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-ef912e69ad-25822489
Merry Christmas

I hope you have time to slow down and celebrate Christmas with family and friends. Too often we get busy and forget to remember the meaning of it all.

On a more somber note, this week I wanted to talk about human trafficking. It's no secret that human trafficking is a serious and distressing problem afflicting our state. I believe that the implicit dignity of all human life must be preserved and our government is fully equipped but unable to act to end this atrocity.

In Congress, I will make it a priority to combat human trafficking and the online exploitation of human beings by freeing up prosecutors and law enforcement to crack down on perpetrators. We also need to assemble a special federal task force that brings together the resources and knowledge of the departments of Homeland Security, Agriculture, and Education as well as ICE to streamline jurisdictional issues.

I am determined to help expand statewide programs, like the one here in Iowa, that train hotel and motel workers to detect victims of human trafficking during their workday.

I am grateful that I get to help educate Iowans about this overlooked issue. But I can't increase public awareness about human trafficking and protect innocent human life without your support. Please consider donating $5, $15 or even $25 (https://richardsforcongress.com/contribution/?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=ef912e69ad-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_17_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-ef912e69ad-25822489) to our campaign, and also help spread our message throughout your community.
🔔 (https://www.emojibase.com/emoji/1f514/bell?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=ef912e69ad-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_17_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-ef912e69ad-25822489) Ring in the new year 🔔 (https://www.emojibase.com/emoji/1f514/bell?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=ef912e69ad-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_17_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-ef912e69ad-25822489)
CHIP IN $20.20 TODAY (http://richardsforcongress.com/contribution?utm_source=Neighborhood&utm_campaign=ef912e69ad-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_17_03_46&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_7d99180ded-ef912e69ad-25822489)
Feel free to reach out to me at bret@richardsforcongress.com or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you!

I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come!

Your neighbor,
