clean_body: Human trafficking isn't something many people want to talk about, but it's already affecting thousands of people right here in Iowa. We need to stomp out this plague on our nation and I'll always be there to address difficult issues. Merry Christmas I hope you have time to slow down and celebrate Christmas with family and friends. Too often we get busy and forget to remember the meaning of it all. On a more somber note, this week I wanted to talk about human trafficking. It's no secret that human trafficking is a serious and distressing problem afflicting our state. I believe that the implicit dignity of all human life must be preserved and our government is fully equipped but unable to act to end this atrocity. In Congress, I will make it a priority to combat human trafficking and the online exploitation of human beings by freeing up prosecutors and law enforcement to crack down on perpetrators. We also need to assemble a special federal task force that brings together the resources and knowledge of the departments of Homeland Security, Agriculture, and Education as well as ICE to streamline jurisdictional issues. I am determined to help expand statewide programs, like the one here in Iowa, that train hotel and motel workers to detect victims of human trafficking during their workday. I am grateful that I get to help educate Iowans about this overlooked issue. But I can't increase public awareness about human trafficking and protect innocent human life without your support. Please consider donating $5, $15 or even $25 () to our campaign, and also help spread our message throughout your community. 🔔 () Ring in the new year 🔔 () CHIP IN $20.20 TODAY () Feel free to reach out to me at bret@richardsforcongress.com or (712)-579-4753 to tell me about your vision for Iowa or to lend a hand on our campaign. I look forward to hearing from you! I invite you to read on to see what I've been up to this week and all of the things we will accomplish together that are yet to come! name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Pelosi fighting McConnell to expand voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In the midst of the impeachment hearings, Nancy Pelosi showed the country what real leadership looks like: She, along with Reps. John Lewis and Terri Sewell, passed a landmark voting rights bill, the Voting Rights Advancement Act (VRAA), which would restore voting rights and election protections gutted by the conservatives on the Supreme Court. BUT Mitch McConnell's waiting to kill the bill in the Senate. Republicans don't want more people to vote. They know that when people vote, the GOP loses. They'd rather keep as few people voting as possible so they can hold on to power and let their rich donors dictate policy instead of the people. At When Democrats, we're doing all we can to inform voters about the GOP's nefarious actions and get them to the polls to defeat the GOP. If we're going to have a fair chance at taking back the Senate and the White House in 2020, everyone who is eligible to vote needs the chance to \-- and we HAVE to stop the GOP from cheating, purging voter rolls, and discouraging voters. We need 10,000 engaged Democrats to demand the Senate pass the VRAA and ensure every eligible voter can vote in 2020 \-- if you believe we need to stand up to the GOP and protect the right to vote: [**Demand the Senate protect the right to vote! >>**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf17/6e9863e8/177d8edc/1db04a10/599594342/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/m76J0kS2") Thank you for standing up for democracy. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf17/6e9863e8/177d8edc/1db04a17/599594342/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191222c.ND&refcode2=GTnVafBM0lP24ctdEH9e")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: Frances, TomSteyer.com
subject: The three richest Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | | 12 Days of Tom
---
---
Happy holidays, friend! Today’s 12 Days of Tom is about the **three** richest Americans: Jeff Bezos, Bill Gates, and Warren Buffett. Together, these three men are worth more than $300,000,000,000 (that’s $300 billion — if you had to count the zeroes a couple times, you’re not alone). Tom has plenty of zeroes to his name, too, so he knows exactly how important and valuable it is for the wealthiest among us to contribute a portion of that wealth back to society. That’s why over a year ago, he proposed a wealth tax on the richest Americans. [_**If you agree that America’s billionaires should have to pay their fair share in a wealth tax, add your name now.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU1BPTVmlzZUUuFOp7lM1akxPTP45d8OFL7kNkzJTpTlTSkUz4wfpTc4yeigOYwGexJ-2FsACXzQi-2B2Lrc45NLaA8zzEdpRX6bkkFMQFpv4DgFLHd7K495-2BHa5Oba9rj9Di087u2BpxCH5j1KlE8nmBBoB81UM-2BDhwyeo8ZWQjqtq7w-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFdTyNUPYNZsw2CpjatSdLW0Vh-2BpJidWEEuXmS9v-2FqQzfZRq2WN1JrAXBYQ9vCJEpMNLvzCdwQ99pPyf9lWGaiBQzVmzIWAq16XlBI4BadPnX-2FksN99TCtjjlugbus3par5Efo13GHcMXj9UkL4leJWPK-2BuNnIeHy1d9hEspElKOqlNmgex0Lxd-2BVaLqnQEbJjDZUnBSjLAXUTY3jdtSJlU-2FDr9X98OmqqowwdWfZCXL-2F9DrMJ5Jaf15ibA4qRCICpygdOJFXEXUBT3WuwvTSUgtMRB6iVARKcDYVZQsCqUk9pKb93uZz0ZHAysLEwbQEL-2B4-2FoQs4MdaZY1JSAG0-2FkGw7bvWLbEPB87P7l3FfxJAcw-3D-3D) It’s difficult to come up with an exact number of what these three could contribute because we don’t have their tax returns here in front of us, but the money coming in from a wealth tax alone on these **three individuals** could be more than $60 billion over 10 years. That could cover nearly half of Tom’s $125 billion dollar plan to support Historically Black Colleges and Universities. Or it could go towards affordable housing. Or investing in clean energy infrastructure. Once we get our tax system to a fair and equitable place, there’s basically no limit to what we could get done. And the fact is, **these three — along with any person whose wealth is over $32 million — _should_ pay to bring the American dream within closer reach for those who are currently overlooked or let down by our government.** And don’t worry about the millionaires and billionaires — they’ll still have way more than they could ever spend. [_**Add your name to support Tom’s equitable tax plan.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU1BPTVmlzZUUuFOp7lM1akxPTP45d8OFL7kNkzJTpTlTSkUz4wfpTc4yeigOYwGexJ-2FsACXzQi-2B2Lrc45NLaA8zzEdpRX6bkkFMQFpv4DgFLHd7K495-2BHa5Oba9rj9Di087u2BpxCH5j1KlE8nmBBoB81UM-2BDhwyeo8ZWQjqtq7w-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFdTyNUPYNZsw2CpjatSdLW0Vh-2BpJidWEEuXmS9v-2FqQzfZRq2WN1JrAXBYQ9vCJEpMNLvzCdwQ99pPyf9lWGaiBQzVmzIWAq16XlBI4BadPnX-2FksN99TCtjjlugbus3par7Xf5HhTwhNHsq09Q1xaJqPlCc1Ev5Wui2fmOX-2FPC2y3k5tTYFogKfYkf1vooC9TiUKkWWK0enIzZ-2Fwczc9yNRw-2BdoPLe05cc4CtqKMGyFNF4MozWh1q1Rc2d6xIHYUFpI3-2FFAkT298JxH2GD0z4ldsETAtn-2FrHlgG8MqaKrGzrtM3qDY5AVfVeTyyuoI1-2BQ9CHGgchlwAqx7KGIS6b7h1X6yozF9vHTvc6rMlbX0Y44Q-3D-3D) Onward,

clean_body: | | | | 12 Days of Tom Happy holidays, friend! Today’s 12 Days of Tom is about the three richest Americans: Jeff Bezos, Bill Gates, and Warren Buffett. Together, these three men are worth more than $300,000,000,000 (that’s $300 billion — if you had to count the zeroes a couple times, you’re not alone). Tom has plenty of zeroes to his name, too, so he knows exactly how important and valuable it is for the wealthiest among us to contribute a portion of that wealth back to society. That’s why over a year ago, he proposed a wealth tax on the richest Americans. It’s difficult to come up with an exact number of what these three could contribute because we don’t have their tax returns here in front of us, but the money coming in from a wealth tax alone on these three individuals could be more than $60 billion over 10 years. That could cover nearly half of Tom’s $125 billion dollar plan to support Historically Black Colleges and Universities. Or it could go towards affordable housing. Or investing in clean energy infrastructure. Once we get our tax system to a fair and equitable place, there’s basically no limit to what we could get done. And the fact is, these three — along with any person whose wealth is over $32 million — should pay to bring the American dream within closer reach for those who are currently overlooked or let down by our government. And don’t worry about the millionaires and billionaires — they’ll still have way more than they could ever spend. Onward, Frances Frances Sawyer Policy Advisor Tom 2020 This is part of our 12 Days of Tom email series — a way to look at the past, present, and future of this campaign! name: MJ Hegar
subject: This is a milestone.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Wow. 25,000.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069a/7f51f7bc/4a13f033/4ef0c83b/86208712/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Wow. **25,000.**

That's how many people have made a financial contribution to this campaign.

By pitching in -- no matter how much -- 25,000 of you said loud and clear that you believe in what we're fighting for, and you're willing to invest in it. Day by day, we are building the powerful campaign we need to win.

**[If you've been waiting for the right time to pitch in, it's right now -- we need you with us as the primary gets closer. Will you donate to our $20,000 Primary Fund Goal?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069a/7f51f7bc/4a13f033/4ef0c83a/86208712/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?refcode=email_20191222.3nd__667__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Whatever your reason for being a part of this team, I'm so glad to have you fighting alongside me. Together, we are going to win this election so we can finally make real progress on climate change, gun violence, immigration reform, and beyond.

Now we have to maintain our hard-won momentum. As we close out 2019, we've got to power through this primary and set this campaign on the strongest path to beat Senator Cornyn. **That 's why I'm asking you to donate now to our Primary Fund Goal. Can you throw a couple of bucks our way?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069a/7f51f7bc/4a13f033/4ef0c83f/86208712/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191222.3nd__667__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069a/7f51f7bc/4a13f033/4ef0c83e/86208712/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191222.3nd__667__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489069a/7f51f7bc/4a13f033/4ef0c83d/86208712/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY2NyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-primaryfund?refcode=email_20191222.3nd__667__")**

subject: Happy Hanukkah!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI SLOAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’re wishing you all lots of light and love during the Festival of Lights. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/67e819a64edd/did-you-hear-about-heidis-arrest-3825085?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=fa614dda8f&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | , We’re wishing y’all lots of light and love during the Festival of Lights. We stand in solidarity with our siblings in the Jewish community always.
**Today our team saw the below image from a Hanukkah in Germany in 1932.** We were moved by this symbol of resistance, and we were struck by how poignant it still is today. **We continue to fight against oppression and violence in all its forms,** and we will battle anti-semitism and white supremacy until these ugly tools of the ruling class can no longer divide us.
---
|
---
| It wouldn’t take a Hanukkah miracle to achieve a society in which all people are safe & truly free --**we just need a working class movement that each and every one of us can be a part of.**
Thank you for standing with us. We have your back.
In solidarity,

Team Heidi
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=f82bfb5a43&e=c169cb0a8e)

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I need you by my side
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We have to go into 2020 strong

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5077%2E377263%2EmDsmmP) Yang Gang --

The past few months have been some of the best for our campaign. We went from being a long shot campaign to being a top contender for the next President of the United States.

**But I know I cannot do this alone -- I need every single member of the Yang Gang by my side as we head into 2020.**

Our campaign is built from the ground up and powered by small-dollar donors -- each contribution allows us to make investments where and when it matters the most. [Will you stand with me now? Contribute $10 or more today and take us to the next level.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20367?t=5&akid=5077%2E377263%2EmDsmmP) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20367?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5077%2E377263%2EmDsmmP)

Our fundraising numbers go public after January 1 and we have to shock everyone watching.

Let’s take this all the way,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20367?t=12&akid=5077%2E377263%2EmDsmmP)
